panels.title: Per Instance PnL — Strategy ${strategy_id} / ${underlying}
panels.description: Each line = one live instance of this strategy trading this underlying. Compare how different instances (configs, versions) perform on the same asset.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS cumulative_pnl FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, sum(benchmark * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS `${underlying} Benchmark` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS cumulative_pnl FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from backtest day 0) — Strategy ${strategy_id} / ${underlying}
panels.description: All instances combined into one weighted return, showing absolute cumulative PnL. Production is offset to continue from the backtest endpoint. Note: absolute levels are not comparable across sources — use the Normalized panel below to compare performance side-by-side.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum((cumulative_pnl + bt_end) * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl + bt_end) ELSE sum((cumulative_pnl + bt_end) * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT p.ts, p.strategy_table_name, p.weighting, p.cumulative_pnl, ifNull(bt.bt_end, 0) AS bt_end FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) AS p LEFT JOIN (SELECT strategy_table_name, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS bt_end FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') GROUP BY strategy_table_name) AS bt ON p.strategy_table_name = bt.strategy_table_name) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS `Backtest PnL`, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(benchmark * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(benchmark) ELSE sum(benchmark * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from 0%) — Strategy ${strategy_id} / ${underlying}
panels.description: Production PnL, Backtest PnL, and Benchmark all rebased to 0 at the start of the selected time window. Use this panel to compare strategy vs buy-and-hold performance across any time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS `Backtest PnL`, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(b * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(b) ELSE sum(b * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS b FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Per Instance Drawdown
panels.description: Drawdown from peak for each production instance. Deeper dips = larger losses from the high-water mark.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, strategy_table_name, cumulative_pnl - max(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS draw_down FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND cumulative_pnl != 0 AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate Drawdown
panels.description: Drawdown of the combined strategy return vs the underlying benchmark drawdown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Production Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Backtest Drawdown`, agg_bm - max(agg_bm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Benchmark Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS agg_pnl, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(b * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(b) ELSE sum(b * weighting) / nullIf((SELECT sum(w) FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, any(weighting) AS w FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY strategy_table_name)), 0) END AS agg_bm FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS b FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Real Trade Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate Position — Strategy ${strategy_id} / ${underlying}
panels.description: Aggregated position across all instances of this strategy+underlying combination. Aggregation follows the selected PnL mode (rescaled/raw weighted/equal weighted).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production Position` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest Position` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade Position` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Per-Instance Position — Strategy ${strategy_id} / ${underlying}
panels.description: Individual position for each instance of this strategy+underlying. Each line is one strategy_table_name.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(position, ts) AS position FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name ORDER BY time

list.name: strategy_id
list.label: Strategy ID
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT toString(strategy_id) FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 ORDER BY strategy_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT toString(strategy_id) FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 ORDER BY strategy_id

list.name: underlying
list.label: Underlying
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT underlying FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) ORDER BY underlying
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT underlying FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) ORDER BY underlying

list.name: mode
list.label: PnL Mode
list.query: Rescaled : rescaled,Raw Weighted : raw_weighted,Equal Weighted : equal
list.description: Rescaled: sum(pnl*w)/sum(w) — normalized to 100%. Raw Weighted: sum(pnl*w) — actual portfolio contribution. Equal Weighted: avg(pnl) — every instance equal.
